title: Thailand Personal Income Tax Return (PIT 90 / ภ.ง.ด.90)
description: The Revenue Department's (RD) ภ.ง.ด.90 ("PIT 90") personal income tax return, tax year 2568 (2025 CE) edition — the return for a resident individual with income beyond pure employment (Revenue Code sections 40(2) through 40(8)), as opposed to ภ.ง.ด.91 (the simpler pure-salary return). Opens Thailand as this registry's 44th jurisdiction, via its Taxes vertical (1 of 6). The live 5-page, 432-AcroForm-widget source is a wide, multi-schedule return covering up to eight separate income-type schedules across pages 2-4 (ข้อ 1 through ข้อ 10), plus a personal-deductions/allowances rider attachment (page 5). This v1.0.0 deliberately scopes to the general/salaried-income filing pathway: page 1's full taxpayer/spouse identification, marital/filing-status, political-party tax-donation, and refund-request/signature blocks; ข้อ 1 (income under Revenue Code sections 40(1)-(2): employment/wages/pension and service-fee/commission income — the single most common income category); ข้อ 11 (the final tax computation, lines 1 through 25, completed by every filer regardless of income type); and the page 5 personal-deductions/allowances attachment (items 1-24), which feeds directly into ข้อ 11 and is used by virtually every filer. Out of scope for this v1.0.0, disclosed in VERIFICATION.md: ข้อ 2 through ข้อ 10 — the section 40(3) royalty/goodwill schedule, 40(4) dividend/interest schedule, 40(5) rental-income schedule, 40(6) professional-fee schedule, the shared 40(3)/(5)/(6)/(7)/(8) actual-expense sub-form, 40(7) contracting-income schedule, 40(8) business/commerce/agriculture schedule, the separate-taxation real-estate-sale schedule (ข้อ 8), the separate-taxation gift/inheritance-income schedule (ข้อ 9), and ข้อ 10 (income electing exclusion from the aggregate computation for RMF/Thai-ESG/pension-insurance purposes) — none of which apply to the general employment/service-income filer this v1.0.0 targets. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Thailand or the Revenue Department.

source.documentRef: ภ.ง.ด.90 (PIT 90), tax year 2568 (2025 CE) edition

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2593. Opens Thailand as this registry's 44th jurisdiction, via its Taxes vertical (1 of 6). Independently re-fetched https://www.rd.go.th/fileadmin/tax_pdf/pit/2568/241268PIT90.pdf this cycle: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 1,629,183 bytes, sha256 e47796b2b5a5e253407dc6e1d0accebb0ebcf18456ff5ee08396c487786e84e5 — matching the cited figures exactly. Re-ran pdfjs-dist (legacy build, getAnnotations({intent:'display'}) filtered to subtype==='Widget') independently: confirmed 5 pages, 432 AcroForm widgets total, 76/95/112/78/71 per page, matching exactly. Deliberately scoped to the general/salaried-income pathway per the task's own explicit permission (see this document's own description and VERIFICATION.md for the full in/out-of-scope breakdown and disclosed judgment calls).

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Tax year (Buddhist Era)
fields.description: The Buddhist-Era tax year this return covers, e.g. "2568" (2025 CE). Printed as a blank fill-in on the main form ("ปีภาษี ............."); this schema's conformance fixtures use "2568", matching the source PDF's own tax-year edition and the printed "ปีภาษี 2568" on the page 5 attachment header.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, header row: "ปีภาษี ............."

fields.name: taxpayerTin
fields.label: Taxpayer ID Number
fields.description: The taxpayer's 13-digit Thai Taxpayer Identification Number.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "ผู้มีเงินได้" column: "เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษีอากร"

fields.name: spouseTin
fields.label: Spouse's ID Number
fields.description: The spouse's 13-digit Thai Taxpayer Identification Number. Required only when maritalStatus is married, per this document's own maritalStatus/marriedStatusDetail gating.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "คู่สมรส" column: "เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษีอากร"

fields.label: Date of birth: year (Buddhist Era)

fields.name: businessEstablishmentName
fields.label: Business establishment name
fields.description: Only applicable to a VAT-registered filer with a place of business; the source instructs a filer with more than one place of business to itemize each in a separate attachment (not modeled in this v1.0.0).

fields.name: returnFilingType
fields.label: Filing type
fields.description: Whether this is an original/normal filing or an additional/amended filing for the same tax year.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ยื่นปกติ ... ยื่นเพิ่มเติม"

fields.name: incomeEarnerStatus
fields.label: Status of the income earner
fields.description: Legal-personality classification of the filer. Values, per the source's own six numbered options: an ordinary individual; a person who died during the tax year; an undivided estate; an ordinary partnership that is not a juristic person; a body of persons that is not a juristic person; or a community enterprise under the Community Enterprise Promotion Act B.E. 2548.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "สถานภาพของผู้มีเงินได้" (1)-(6)

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "โสด สมรส หม้าย"

fields.name: marriedStatusDetail
fields.label: Marital status detail (when married)
fields.description: Sub-classification of when the marriage/dissolution occurred within the tax year, which affects whether spousal income is aggregated for the full year or only part of it.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "สถานภาพการสมรส" column: "สมรสและอยู่ร่วมกันตลอดปีภาษี / สมรสระหว่างปีภาษี / หย่าระหว่างปีภาษี / ตายระหว่างปีภาษี"

fields.name: filingStatus
fields.label: Joint/separate tax computation status (when married)
fields.description: Whether the couple computes tax jointly, files separately, or files separately for section 40(1) income only. DISCLOSED SIMPLIFICATION: a second, narrower radio-button group on the same source column (2 further options, plus a "single income type and separate filing" annotation) sits immediately below this one and could not be confidently correlated to a distinct printed label pair given the compressed layout; it is not separately modeled in this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "สถานะการยื่นแบบฯ" column: "รวมคำนวณภาษี / แยกยื่นแบบ / แยกยื่นแบบเฉพาะมาตรา 40(1)"

fields.name: spouseIncomeSection
fields.label: Spouse's income (which Revenue Code section)
fields.description: Declares which Revenue Code section(s) the spouse's own income falls under, or that the spouse has no income — used together with maritalStatus/filingStatus to determine whether/how spousal income is aggregated. Modeled only for the spouse: the taxpayer filing this return is, by definition, always a person with income, so the source form carries no equivalent taxpayer-side toggle.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, "สถานะการยื่นแบบฯ" column: "(1) มีเงินได้มาตรา 40(1)-(8) / (2) มาตรา 40(2)-(8) / (3) มาตรา 40(1) / (4) ไม่มีเงินได้"

fields.name: spousePassportNumber
fields.label: Spouse's passport number
fields.description: Only applicable when the spouse is a foreign national with no income of their own. No discrete boolean field on the source drives this condition (it is a heading, not a gated widget), so this schema leaves it optional rather than encoding an unsupported requiredWhen — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "กรณีคู่สมรสเป็นคนต่างด้าวและไม่มีเงินได้โปรดระบุ: เลขที่หนังสือเดินทาง"

fields.name: spouseForeignCountry
fields.label: Spouse's country
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ประเทศ ........."

fields.name: taxpayerDonationWish
fields.label: Taxpayer: donate tax to a political party?
fields.description: Declaration of intent to allocate part of the taxpayer's tax payment to a political party.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "การแสดงเจตนาอุดหนุนเงินภาษีที่ชำระให้พรรคการเมือง ... ผู้มีเงินได้ ประสงค์อุดหนุนเงินภาษี/ไม่ประสงค์อุดหนุนเงินภาษี"

fields.name: taxpayerDonationAmount
fields.label: Taxpayer's donation amount (baht)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, taxpayer donation row: amount (baht)

fields.name: taxpayerDonationPartyCode
fields.label: Taxpayer's chosen political party code
fields.description: Only a Thai-national individual taxpayer may donate to a political party through this mechanism, per the source's own footnote.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "รหัสพรรคการเมือง"

fields.name: spouseDonationWish
fields.label: Spouse: donate tax to a political party?
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, spouse donation row (same layout as taxpayer's)

fields.name: spouseDonationAmount
fields.label: Spouse's donation amount (baht)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, spouse donation row: amount (baht)

fields.name: spouseDonationPartyCode
fields.label: Spouse's chosen political party code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, spouse donation row: "รหัสพรรคการเมือง"

fields.name: summaryExcessTaxPaid
fields.label: Excess tax paid (page 1 summary)
fields.description: A page-1 recap box, immediately above the certification/refund-request block, mirroring the final result of ข้อ 11 (see section11FinalDueOrOverpaid) rather than an independent computation.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ภาษีที่ชำระไว้เกิน ..... บาท"

fields.name: summaryAdditionalTaxDue
fields.label: Additional tax due (page 1 summary)
fields.description: A page-1 recap box mirroring the final result of ข้อ 11 (see section11FinalDueOrOverpaid) rather than an independent computation.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม ..... บาท"

fields.name: refundRequestedAmount
fields.label: Refund amount requested (baht)
fields.description: The source carries no discrete Yes/No widget for "do you request a refund" separate from this amount field itself; a filer requesting no refund simply leaves this blank. Not gated by requiredWhen for that reason — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ข้าพเจ้ามีความประสงค์จะขอคืนเงินภาษีที่ชำระไว้เกิน ... เป็นจำนวนเงิน ..... บาท"

fields.name: attachedEvidenceSheetCount
fields.label: Number of evidence sheets attached
fields.description: Count of supporting evidence sheets attached to the refund request (rights-entitlement certificate, income certificate, special-development-zone income certificate, foreign-income certificate).
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "รวม ..... ฉบับ"

fields.name: taxpayerSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of taxpayer's signature
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, taxpayer signature block: "วันที่ ....."

fields.name: representativeName
fields.label: Representative's printed name
fields.description: Optional — completed only when the return is filed by a legal representative or attorney (e.g. for an undivided estate or a deceased taxpayer). The source has no discrete boolean gating this block, so it is left fully optional rather than encoded with an unsupported requiredWhen.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, representative signature block: "(.....................)"

fields.name: representativeCapacity
fields.label: Representative's capacity
fields.description: The representative's relationship/capacity in respect of the taxpayer (e.g. executor, guardian, attorney).
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ในฐานะเป็น ..... ของผู้มีเงินได้"

fields.name: representativeAddressLine1
fields.label: Representative's address (line 1)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "ที่อยู่ (ของผู้แทน) ....."

fields.name: representativeAddressLine2
fields.label: Representative's address (line 2)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, representative address block, continuation line

fields.name: representativeSignatureDate
fields.label: Date of representative's signature
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, representative signature block: "วันที่ ....."

fields.name: section1PayerTin
fields.label: Section 1: payer's taxpayer ID number
fields.description: Taxpayer ID of the (single, bounded) payer of this employment/service income — e.g. the employer.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1 header block: "ผู้จ่ายเงินได้ – เลขประจำตัวผู้เสียภาษีอากร"

fields.name: section1Section40_1Income
fields.label: 1. Income under section 40(1) (salary, wages, pension, etc.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 1: "มาตรา 40(1) ได้แก่ เงินเดือน ค่าจ้าง บำนาญ ฯลฯ"

fields.name: section1ProvidentFundExcessDeduction
fields.label: 2.(1) Provident fund contribution (amount over 10,000 baht)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 2(1): "เงินสะสมกองทุนสำรองเลี้ยงชีพ (ส่วนที่เกิน 10,000 บาท)"

fields.name: section1GpfDeduction
fields.label: 2.(2) Government Pension Fund (GPF) contribution
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 2(2): "เงินสะสม กบข."

fields.name: section1PrivateTeacherFundDeduction
fields.label: 2.(3) Private school teacher welfare fund contribution
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 2(3): "เงินสะสมกองทุนสงเคราะห์ครูโรงเรียนเอกชน"

fields.name: section1SeverancePayDeduction
fields.label: 2.(4) Severance pay received under labor law
fields.description: Only when included in this tax computation, per the source's own parenthetical.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 2(4): "เงินค่าชดเชยที่ได้รับตามกฎหมายแรงงาน (กรณีนำมารวมคำนวณภาษี)"

fields.name: section1TotalDeductions1to4
fields.label: 2. Total of (1) to (4)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1: "รวม (1) ถึง (4)"

fields.name: section1AttachmentSheetCount
fields.label: Number of evidence sheets attached for (1)-(4)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1: "(หลักฐานแนบตาม (1) ถึง (4) รวม ..... ฉบับ)"

fields.name: section1Section40_2Income
fields.label: 3. Income under section 40(2) (meeting fees, commissions, etc.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 3: "มาตรา 40(2) ได้แก่ เบี้ยประชุม ค่านายหน้า ฯลฯ"

fields.name: section1Subtotal
fields.label: 4. Remaining (1. - 2. + 3.)
fields.description: Line 1 minus line 2 plus line 3. Source presents this as a literal computed cell.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 4: "คงเหลือ (1. - 2.+ 3.)"

fields.name: section1ExpenseDeduction
fields.label: 5. Less expenses (50%, not exceeding 100,000 baht)
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 5: "หักค่าใช้จ่าย (ร้อยละ 50 แต่ไม่เกิน 100,000 บาท)"

fields.name: section1NetIncomeCarriedForward
fields.label: 6. Remaining (4. - 5.), carried to ข้อ 11 line 1
fields.description: Carried forward as the input to section11IncomeAfterExpenses (ข้อ 11, line 1). Because this schema models only ข้อ 1 of the source's seven income-category schedules (ข้อ 1 through ข้อ 7), for the general/salaried scope this schema targets this figure is expected to equal section11IncomeAfterExpenses directly.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, ข้อ 1, line 6: "คงเหลือ (4. - 5.) ยกไปรวมใน ข้อ 11 1."

fields.name: section11IncomeAfterExpenses
fields.label: ข้อ 11.1 Income after deducting expenses
fields.description: Total from the last line of ข้อ 1 through ข้อ 7 (this schema models only ข้อ 1's section1NetIncomeCarriedForward; ข้อ 2 through ข้อ 7 are out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 1: "เงินได้หลังจากหักค่าใช้จ่าย (รวมยอดมาจากรายการสุดท้ายของ ข้อ 1 ถึง ข้อ 7)"

fields.name: section11AllowancesDeduction
fields.label: ข้อ 11.2 Less allowances (from attachment)
fields.description: Carried from the last line of the personal-deductions/allowances attachment (attachmentItem24Total).
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 2: "หัก ค่าลดหย่อนฯ (ยกมาจากรายการสุดท้ายของใบแนบแสดงรายละเอียดรายการลดหย่อนและยกเว้นหลังหักค่าใช้จ่าย)"

fields.name: section11Subtotal1
fields.label: ข้อ 11.3 Remaining (1. - 2.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 3: "คงเหลือ (1. - 2.)"

fields.name: section11Donation1Deduction
fields.label: ข้อ 11.4 Less donation (2x actual, up to 10% of line 3)
fields.description: Political/education/sports-style donations eligible for the 2x multiplier, capped at 10% of line 3.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 4: "หัก เงินบริจาค (2 เท่าของจำนวนที่ได้จ่ายไปจริง แต่ไม่เกินร้อยละ 10 ของ 3.)"

fields.name: section11Subtotal2
fields.label: ข้อ 11.5 Remaining (3. - 4.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 5: "คงเหลือ (3. - 4.)"

fields.name: section11Donation2Deduction
fields.label: ข้อ 11.6 Less donation (up to 10% of line 5)
fields.description: General (1x) donations, capped at 10% of line 5.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 6: "หัก เงินบริจาค (ไม่เกินร้อยละ 10 ของ 5.)"

fields.name: section11NetIncome
fields.label: ข้อ 11.7 Net income (5. - 6.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 7: "เงินได้สุทธิ (5. - 6.)"

fields.name: section11TaxFromNetIncome
fields.label: ข้อ 11.8 Tax computed from net income (per line 7)
fields.description: Progressive personal income tax computed on section11NetIncome per Thailand's statutory tax bands. This schema does not itself assert or embed the current band table; the figure is a field the source presents, computed per Revenue Code Section 48.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 8: "ภาษีคำนวณจากเงินได้สุทธิ ตาม 7."

fields.name: section11AlternativeTaxBase
fields.label: ข้อ 11.9a Gross income base for the 0.5% alternative computation
fields.description: Total gross income before deducting expenses, from ข้อ 1 through ข้อ 7, EXCLUDING income under section 40(1). Required only when this total is 120,000 baht or more (per the source's own threshold); this schema still models the field for the general case, since for a pure section-40(1) salaried filer with no other income category modeled, this figure is 0.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 9: "ภาษีคำนวณจากเงินได้พึงประเมินตั้งแต่ 120,000 บาทขึ้นไป คือร้อยละ 0.5 ของรวมยอดเงินได้ก่อนหักค่าใช้จ่ายตาม ข้อ 1 ถึง ข้อ 7 (ไม่รวมเงินได้ตามมาตรา 40(1)) X 0.005"

fields.name: section11AlternativeTaxComputed
fields.label: ข้อ 11.9b Tax computed at 0.5% of that base
fields.description: section11AlternativeTaxBase multiplied by 0.005.

fields.name: section11TaxPayable
fields.label: ข้อ 11.10 Tax payable (higher of line 8 or line 9)
fields.description: The greater of section11TaxFromNetIncome and section11AlternativeTaxComputed, except that when line 9 computes to 5,000 baht or less, line 8's figure is used instead (the source's own de-minimis floor for the alternative 0.5% computation).
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 10: "ภาษีเงินได้ที่ต้องชำระ (จำนวนที่มากกว่าระหว่าง 8. กับ 9. เว้นแต่กรณี 9. คำนวณแล้วไม่เกิน 5,000 บาท ให้ชำระภาษีตาม 8.)"

fields.name: section11SpecialZoneTax
fields.label: ข้อ 11.11 Tax due from the special development zone income certificate
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 11: "ภาษีที่ต้องชำระจากใบแสดงเงินได้ฯ ในเขตพัฒนาพิเศษเฉพาะกิจ"

fields.name: section11TotalTaxPayable
fields.label: ข้อ 11.12 Total tax payable
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 12: "รวมภาษีที่ต้องชำระ"

fields.name: section11ForeignTaxCredit
fields.label: ข้อ 11.13 Less foreign tax credit
fields.description: Not to exceed the tax otherwise payable under Thai law.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 13: "หัก เครดิตภาษีเงินได้จากต่างประเทศ (ไม่เกินภาษีที่ต้องเสียตามกฎหมายประเทศไทย)"

fields.name: section11TaxAfterForeignCredit
fields.label: ข้อ 11.14 Tax payable after foreign tax credit (12. - 13.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 14: "ภาษีที่ต้องชำระหลังหักเครดิตภาษีเงินได้จากต่างประเทศ (12. - 13.)"

fields.name: section11WithholdingTaxCredit
fields.label: ข้อ 11.15 Less withholding tax and tax credit
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 15: "หัก ภาษีเงินได้หัก ณ ที่จ่ายและเครดิตภาษี"

fields.name: section11Pit93Prepayment
fields.label: ข้อ 11.15a Tax paid in advance via Form PIT 93
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11: "ภาษีเงินได้ชำระไว้ตามแบบ ภ.ง.ด. 93"

fields.name: section11Pit94Prepayment
fields.label: ข้อ 11.15b Tax paid in advance via Form PIT 94
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11: "ภาษีเงินได้ชำระไว้ตามแบบ ภ.ง.ด. 94"

fields.name: section11NetTaxDueOrOverpaid
fields.label: ข้อ 11.16 Additional tax due / overpaid tax (interim)
fields.description: Signed figure: positive means additional tax due, negative means overpaid tax. DISCLOSED SIMPLIFICATION: the source pairs this computed amount with a small "which applies" Yes/No radio-button toggle; this schema models only the signed numeric result rather than a separate toggle plus an always-positive magnitude, consistent with how the source's own plain subtraction lines (e.g. section11Subtotal1) are modeled — see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 16: "ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม/ชำระไว้เกิน"

fields.name: section11CarriedFromRealEstateSchedule
fields.label: ข้อ 11.17 Additional tax due / overpaid tax (from ข้อ 8, if any)
fields.description: Carried from ข้อ 8 (the separate-taxation real-estate-sale schedule), which is out of scope for this v1.0.0. Modeled as an optional field defaulting to 0/absent for a filer with no such income.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 17: "ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม/ชำระไว้เกิน (ยกมาจากข้อ 8 (ถ้ามี))"

fields.name: section11Line18AttachmentCount
fields.label: Number of evidence sheets attached for lines 4, 6, 13, 15 and 17
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 18: "(หลักฐานแนบ 4. , 6. , 13. , 15. และ 17. รวม ........ ฉบับ)"

fields.name: section11TotalDueOrOverpaid
fields.label: ข้อ 11.18 Total additional tax due / overpaid tax
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 18: "รวม ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม/ชำระไว้เกิน"

fields.name: section11AddFromGiftSchedule
fields.label: ข้อ 11.19 Plus additional tax due (from ข้อ 9, if any)
fields.description: Carried from ข้อ 9 (the separate-taxation gift/inheritance-income schedule), out of scope for this v1.0.0.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 19: "บวก ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม (ยกมาจากข้อ 9 (ถ้ามี))"

fields.name: section11AddFromAttachmentLine6
fields.label: ข้อ 11.20 Plus additional tax due (from attachment line 6, if any)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 20: "บวก ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม (ยกมาจาก 6. ของใบแนบ (ถ้ามี))"

fields.name: section11LessFromAttachmentLine7
fields.label: ข้อ 11.21 Less overpaid tax (from attachment line 7, if any)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 21: "หัก ภาษีที่ชำระไว้เกิน (ยกมาจาก 7. ของใบแนบ (ถ้ามี))"

fields.name: section11LessAmendedOriginalTax
fields.label: ข้อ 11.22 Less tax computed per original PIT90/91 (amended filing)
fields.description: Only applicable when returnFilingType is amended — the tax already computed on the taxpayer's original PIT 90/91 filing for the same tax year.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 22: "หัก ภาษีที่คำนวณได้ตามการยื่นแบบ ภ.ง.ด.90 ภ.ง.ด.91 (กรณียื่นเพิ่มเติม)"

fields.name: section11Subtotal3
fields.label: ข้อ 11.23 Additional tax due / overpaid tax (subtotal)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 23: "ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม/ชำระไว้เกิน"

fields.name: section11Surcharge
fields.label: ข้อ 11.24 Plus surcharge (if any)
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 24: "บวก เงินเพิ่ม (ถ้ามี)"

fields.name: section11FinalDueOrOverpaid
fields.label: ข้อ 11.25 Total additional tax due / overpaid tax (final)
fields.description: The return's bottom-line figure: a positive value is additional tax owed to the Revenue Department, a negative value is a refund due to the taxpayer. Cross-references summaryExcessTaxPaid/summaryAdditionalTaxDue on page 1 and refundRequestedAmount.
fields.sourceRef: Page 4, ข้อ 11, line 25: "รวม ภาษีที่ชำระเพิ่มเติม/ชำระไว้เกิน"

documents.label: Certification that the return's information is true
documents.statement: ข้าพเจ้าขอรับรองว่ารายการที่แสดงไว้เป็นความจริงทุกประการ ("I certify that the particulars given are true in every respect.")

documents.label: Supporting evidence for a refund request (rights-entitlement / income certificate)
documents.handling: Attached only when refundRequestedAmount is completed. The source lists several possible evidence types on one combined line (rights-entitlement certificate, income certificate, special-development-zone income certificate, foreign-source-income certificate) without discrete per-type checkboxes in the source PDF; not machine-gated via requiredWhen since refundRequestedAmount is itself an optional numeric field with no boolean counterpart to key a condition on — disclosed in VERIFICATION.md.
documents.sourceRef: Page 1: "พร้อมนี้ได้แนบหลักฐานใบแสดงสิทธิฯ ใบแสดงเงินได้ฯ"
